subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Spirit calleth out in this wilderness, saying: "Here am I! Here am I! O Beloved of the worlds!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینادی الروح فی هذا البیدآء و یقول لبیک لبیک یا محبوب العالم و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
